arts.ttl: Vinicius and Real Madrid dominate FIFA's The Best Awards
arts.sum: A fter the disappointment of losing out in the Ballon d'Or voting, Real Madrid's Brazilian striker Vinicius Jr. was named The Best FIFA Men's Player at the awards ceremony held in Doha, Qatar. "I want to share this with the club, with my president and with my players, those of the best club in the world," Ancelotti said on stage as he received his award.

arts.ttl: FIFA Best Awards: World's top XI revealed as stars from Barcelona, Real Madrid, Man City and Aston Villa all earn spots
arts.sum: After votes from fans and experts football's governing body has revealed the best XI of 2024 at a glamorous awards ceremony in Qatar

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior named The Best FIFA Men's Player award for 2024
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinicius Junior has been named 2024's winner of The Best FIFA Men's Player prize.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Vinicius Junior wins FIFA Best award after Real Madrid star's Ballon d'Or fury
arts.sum: Rodri beat Real Madrid star Vinicius Junior to win the Ballon d'Or in October but the Brazilian has got his own back by pipping the Manchester City midfielder to the men's FIFA Best award

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti scoops The Best FIFA Men's Coach award for 2024
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has been named The Best FIFA Men's Coach for 2024.

arts.ttl: “Everyone thought it would be an easy ride” – Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti responds to criticism
arts.sum: Real Madrid have not had an easy season up until now, although they can pick up their second trophy of the campaign if they defeat Pachuca in the Intercontinental Cup on Wednesday. Carlo Ancelotti’s side suffered another disappointing result on Saturday as they were held to a 3-3 draw by Rayo Vallecano. That incited more […] The post “Everyone thought it would be an easy ride” – Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti responds to criticism appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Bellingham: "We're eager to win another trophy to continue adding to Real Madrid's worldwide list of honours"
arts.sum: The England midfielder said: "It's a great pleasure to be playing in another final, a very important game for us to win another title and continue to add to the club's global list of honours. I'm sure it'll be a great campaign and we can turn things around by playing some good football.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa and Newcastle Want to Sign ‘Superb’ Real Madrid Star
arts.sum: The Real Madrid youngster has shot to prominence in recent weeks and that has seen the Premier League side take a huge interest in his services

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star set to be named winner of ‘The Best’ award
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid is all set to be named as the winner of FIFA’s ‘The Best’ player prize. That’s according…

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Pachuca injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury news ahead of Wednesday's FIFA Intercontinental Cup final between Real Madrid and Pachuca.
